items.name: Panchmela Dal
items.description: Panchmel dal also known as panchratna dal is a protein-packed lentil dish that contains the goodness and nutritive qualities of 5 different DALS. Not only it is healthy but also equally delicious. This hearty and nutritious recipe comes from Rajasthani cuisine and made without onion and garlic.

items.name: Mix Raita
items.description: Veg Raita is a raita variant made with Curd (yogurt), spices and an assortment of veggies. Being healthy, this Mix Vegetable Raita also perks up your everyday meals in the flavor and nutrition department.

items.name: Rajasthani Kadhi
items.description: Kadhi is a tasty and aromatic gravy that holds some unique combinations of flavors which include spicy, sour, and tangy as well.Kadhi is usually paired with hot steamed basmati rice, bajra ki roti, khichdi, pulao, jeera rice, etc.

items.name: Masala Papad
items.description: Masala Papad is a starter snack of crispy rosted papad topped with a tangy, spiced masala filling of onions, tomatoes, herbs and spices.

items.name: Paneer Stuffed Besan Chilla With Green Chutney (2pc)
items.description: Instant besan chilla is a crispy crepe made with besan (chana dal flour) with paneer stuffed to make a filling, tasty, snack or dinner.

items.name: Suji Chilla (2pc)
items.description: Suji ka Cheela or Rava Chilla is a popular North Indian style savory pancake made with suji or rava (cream of wheat), onions, herbs and spices surved with Green Delicious Chutney

items.name: Chole Kulcha (2pc)
items.description: Chole Kulche An Old Delhi Delicacy Cherished by Street Food Lovers, From school kids to office goers, everyone seems to enjoy this masaledaar street food snack that is more like a meal in itself. This combination of boiled chickpeas (chole) and a soft white flour bread (kulcha) is served garnished with chopped onions, juicy tomatoes, powdered spices and a generous squeeze of lime.
